workflow.name: Oracle Database Free HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate Oracle Database Free HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare Oracle Database Free inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/oracle_database_free-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[oracle_database_free]
10.31.116.11 role=oracle name=oracle-database-free-01
10.31.116.12 role=oracle name=oracle-database-free-02
10.31.116.13 role=oracle name=oracle-database-free-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install Oracle Database Free container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/oracle_database_free-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: oracle_database_free
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/oracle_database_free-inventory.ini /tmp/oracle_database_free-runtime.yml

data.label: Render Oracle Database Free cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/oracle_database_free-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: oracle_database_free
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/oracle_database_free
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/oracle_database_free/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            oracle-free:
              image: gvenzl/oracle-free:23-slim
              container_name: octastack-oracle-free
              restart: unless-stopped
              environment:
                ORACLE_PASSWORD: "ChangeMe123!"
              ports:
                - "1521:1521"
              volumes:
                - data:/opt/oracle/oradata
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy Oracle Database Free cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/oracle_database_free-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/oracle_database_free/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/oracle_database_free/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/oracle_database_free/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/oracle_database_free-inventory.ini /tmp/oracle_database_free-deploy.yml

data.label: Document Oracle Database Free topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/oracle_database_free-topology.md <<'EOF'
# Oracle Database Free HA topology

Members:
- oracle-database-free-01: 10.31.116.11 (oracle)
- oracle-database-free-02: 10.31.116.12 (oracle)
- oracle-database-free-03: 10.31.116.13 (oracle)

This example deploys one Oracle Database Free container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/oracle_database_free-topology.md

data.label: Validate Oracle Database Free cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/oracle_database_free-inventory.ini oracle_database_free -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'

data.label: Oracle Database Free HA health check
